paperTitle: P1: Physics Olympiad Solving with RL
content:
## P1: Physics Olympiad Solving with RL

Apply reinforcement learning to complex physics problem-solving, combining symbolic reasoning with learned reward signals to master olympiad-level tasks.

### Core Concept

RL framework for physics reasoning combining symbolic systems with learned policies

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.13612

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When tackling complex physics problems or training agents on physics reasoning
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: P1: Mastering Physics Olympiads with Reinforcement Learning
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.13612
